Class Modal.ModalBuilder<C,R>

java.lang.Object
io.github.lukagg13.hotelmanagementapp.ui.component.Modal.ModalBuilder<C,R>
Type Parameters:
C - The type of the controller that will be passed in to the view.
R - The return type of modal.
Enclosing class:
Modal<C,R>
public static final class Modal.ModalBuilder<C,R> extends Object
Builder class used for creating Modal objects.

      controller - The controller that will be used for the view.

      Modal.ModalBuilder for builder pattern.

    • mapper

      public Modal.ModalBuilder<C,R> mapper(Function<C,R> mapper)
      Sets the mapper function for getting the result from the controller.
      Parameters:
      mapper - The Function that will be used to get results.
      Returns:
      Modal.ModalBuilder for builder pattern.
